mods.name: Increase Fuel Tank Capacity
mods.effectExpr: Local.FuelType = Engine.EngineName := 'Sail*' 'Electric*' 'Methane*' 'Gasoline*' 'Diesel*' 'Jet Propeller*' 'Turbine*';Cost += Level * Local.FuelType : 0 2 2 2 2 1 1;Fuel += Level * Local.FuelType : 0 5 5 1 1 10 10;CFUsed += Level * Local.FuelType : 0 0 0.5 0.02 0.02 0.2 0.2

mods.name: Signature Improvement
mods.effectExpr: Cost += Level ^ 4 * 200; Sig += Level; Security = Security >> Level : 0 1 0; Military = Military >> Level : 0 0 1

mods.name: Engine Customization
mods.effectExpr: Global.EC = Level; Global.ECLevel = Level; Local.base = 0.75 + 0.5 * Level;Global.ECCost = Engine.Cost * Local.base; Cost += Global.ECCost

mods.name: Engine Customization: Speed
mods.effectExpr: Global.EC -= Level;Speed += 30 * Level; Local.Max = Speed >> SpeedMax; SpeedMax = Local.Max << SpeedMax * 1.75

mods.name: Engine Customization: Acceleration
mods.effectExpr: Global.EC -= Level;Accel += 2 * Level; Local.Max = Accel >> AccelMax; AccelMax = Local.Max << AccelMax * 1.75

mods.name: Engine Customization: Load
mods.effectExpr: Global.EC -= Level;Load += 50 * Body * Level; Local.Max = Load >> LoadMax; LoadMax = Local.Max << LoadMax * 1.75

mods.name: Turbocharging
mods.effectExpr: Cost += Engine.Cost * 1.75 ^ Level;Speed += 15 * Level; Accel += Level;Sig -= 1 * Level;Economy *= 0.95 ^ Level;Engine.SpeedMax * 0.25 < 15; SpeedMax += 15 ? Engine.SpeedMax * 0.25

mods.name: Autonav
mods.effectExpr: Cost -= Autonav : 5 10 50 150; Autonav = Level; Cost += Level : 5 10 50 150

mods.name: Drive-by-Wire
mods.effectExpr: Level > 0;Global.DBW = 10 ? 0; Global.DBWLevel = Level; Handling -= Level; Cost += Chassis.Cost * 1.75 ^ Level - Chassis.Cost

mods.name: Improved Control Surfaces
mods.effectExpr: Handling -= Level; Cost += Chassis.Cost * 1.40 ^ Level - Chassis.Cost

mods.name: Improved Suspension
mods.effectExpr: Handling -= Level; Chassis.ChassisType & 17 == 17; OffRoad -= Level ? 0; Cost += Chassis.Cost * 1.25 ^ Level - Chassis.Cost

mods.name: Off-Road Suspension
mods.effectExpr: Handling += Level; OffRoad -= Level; Speed -= 15; Local.foo = Chassis.ChassisType / 8; Economy *= Local.foo : 1.15 1.3 1.3 1.4; Cost += Chassis.Cost * 1.50 ^ Level - Chassis.Cost

mods.name: Remote Pilot Advanced Programming
mods.effectExpr: Cost -= Pilot : 0 50 250 1250 5000; Pilot = Level; Cost += Level : 0 50 250 1250 5000; Security = Security >> Level : 0 0 0 1 0; Military = Military >> Level : 0 0 0 0 1

mods.name: Standard Armour
mods.effectExpr: Armour += Level; LoadUsed += Body * Body * 5 * Level; Handling += Level / 6; Cost += 50 * Level

mods.name: Concealed Armour
mods.effectExpr: Armour += Level; LoadUsed += Body * Body * 5 * Level; CFUsed += 2 * Level; Cost += 50 * Level

mods.name: Life Support Systems
mods.effectExpr: LoadUsed += Level / 10 * 25; CFUsed += Level / 10; Cost += 5 + Level

mods.name: Smart Armour Systems (SAS)
mods.effectExpr: Military = 1; LoadUsed += Body * 50 * Armour; CFUsed += 2; Cost += 250

mods.name: Active Thermal Masking
mods.effectExpr: Sig += Level; CFUsed += 3; LoadUsed += 100; Cost += Global.ECCost * Level : 0 0.2 0.45

mods.name: Fixed mount, ext Firmpoint
mods.effectExpr: Global.Points += Level; LoadUsed += 10 * Level; CFUsed += 0.5 * Level; Cost += 10 * Level; Sig -= Level; Security = 1 - Military

mods.name: Fixed mount, int Firmpoint
mods.effectExpr: Global.Points += Level; LoadUsed += 10 * Level; CFUsed += 3 * Level; Cost += 20 * Level; Security = 1 - Military

mods.name: Fixed mount, ext Hardpoint
mods.effectExpr: Global.SideCar -= 1; Global.Points += 2 * Level; LoadUsed += 10 * Level; CFUsed += 1 * Level; Cost += 25 * Level;  Sig -= Level; Security = 1 - Military

mods.name: Fixed mount, int Hardpoint
mods.effectExpr: Global.SideCar -= 1; Global.Points += 2 * Level; LoadUsed += 10 * Level; CFUsed += 4 * Level; Cost += 35 * Level; Security = 1 - Military

mods.name: External Rocket Mounts
mods.effectExpr: Global.Points += Level; Chassis.ChassisType & 8; Sig -= Level / 2 ? 1; Security = 1 - Military

mods.name: Internal Rocket Mounts
mods.effectExpr: Global.Points += Level; CFUsed += Level + Level * 1.5; Security = 1 - Military

mods.name: Pintle Mounts
mods.effectExpr: Global.Points += Level; Cost += Level; Security = 1 - Military

mods.name: Ring Mounts
mods.effectExpr: Global.Points += 2 * Level; Chassis.ChassisType == 72; CFUsed += 16 ? 1; LoadUsed += 25; Cost += 10; Security = 1 - Military

mods.name: Turrets (mini)
mods.effectExpr: Global.Points += 2 * Level; Sig -= Level; Global.TMini += Level; Global.TMiniCF += 6 * Level; CFUsed += 6 * Level; LoadUsed += 25 * Level; Global.TMiniCost += 125 * Level; Cost += 125 * Level; Security = 1 - Military

mods.name: Turrets (small)
mods.effectExpr: Global.Points += 2 * 2 * Level; Sig -= Level; Global.TSmall += Level; Global.TSmall += 7 * Level; CFUsed += 7 * Level; LoadUsed += 100 * Level; Global.TSmallCost += 250 * Level; Cost += 250 * Level; Security = 1 - Military

mods.name: Turrets (medium)
mods.effectExpr: Global.Points += 3 * 2 * Level; Sig -= Level; Global.TMedium += Level; Global.TMediumCF += 16 * Level; CFUsed += 16 * Level; LoadUsed += 1000 * Level; Global.TMediumCost += 500 * Level; Cost += 500 * Level; Security = 1 - Military

mods.name: Turrets, Remote (micro)
mods.effectExpr: Global.Points += Level; Sig -= Level; Global.TMicro += Level; Global.TMicroCF += 0 * Level; LoadUsed += 10 * Level; Global.TMicroCost += 100 * Level; Cost += 100 * Level; Security = 1 - Military

mods.name: Turrets, Remote (mini)
mods.effectExpr: Global.Points += 2 * Level; Sig -= Level; Global.TMini += Level; Global.TMiniCF += 3 * Level; CFUsed += 3 * Level; LoadUsed += 25 * Level; Global.TMiniCost += 175 * Level; Cost += 175 * Level; Security = 1 - Military

mods.name: Turrets, Remote (small)
mods.effectExpr: Global.Points += 2 * 2 * Level; Sig -= Level; Global.TSmall += Level; Global.TSmallCF += 4 * Level; CFUsed += 4 * Level; LoadUsed += 100 * Level; Global.TSmallCost += 350 * Level; Cost += 350 * Level; Security = 1 - Military

mods.name: Turrets, Remote (medium)
mods.effectExpr: Global.Points += 3 * 2 * Level; Sig -= Level; Global.TMedium += Level; Global.TMediumCF += 4 * Level; CFUsed += 4 * Level; LoadUsed += 1000 * Level; Global.TMediumCost += 600 * Level; Cost += 600 * Level; Security = 1 - Military

mods.name: Vehicle Gyroscopic Stabilizers
mods.effectExpr: CFUsed += 1; LoadUsed += 24 + Level; Cost += 15 * Level; Level > Body; Local.Handling = Level ? Body; Local.Handling -= Body; Handling += Local.Handling; OffRoad += Local.Handling

mods.name: ED
mods.effectExpr: Security = 1; Military = Military >> Level : 0 0 0 1 1 1; CFUSed += Level : 2 4 6 4 6 8; LoadUsed += Level : 35 45 60 45 60 110; Cost += Level : 150 400 1000 2500 10000 20000

mods.name: ECD
mods.effectExpr: Security = 1; Military = Military >> Level : 0 0 0 1 1 1; CFUSed += Level : 2 4 6 4 6 8; LoadUsed += Level : 35 45 60 45 60 110; Cost += Level : 100 300 800 3000 8000 20000

mods.name: Power Amplifiers
mods.effectExpr: CFUsed += Level / 4; LoadUsed += Level; Cost +=  5 * Level

mods.name: Aircraft Drop Tanks
mods.effectExpr: Global.Points += 2 * Level; Fuel += 2000 * Level; Sig -= Level; Speed -= Level; Handling += Level; Cost += 32 * Level

mods.name: Bench Seats
mods.effectExpr: Global.Benches += Level; CFUsed += 6 * Level; LoadUsed += 150 * Level

mods.name: Bench Seats (Folding)
mods.effectExpr: Global.Benches += Level; CFUsed += 6 * Level; LoadUsed += 150 * Level

mods.name: Bench Seats (Reinforced)
mods.effectExpr: Global.Benches += Level; CFUsed += 8 * Level; LoadUsed += 300 * Level; Cost += 5 * Level

mods.name: Bucket Seats
mods.effectExpr: Global.Buckets += Level; CFUsed += 6 * Level; LoadUsed += 150 * Level

mods.name: Bucket Seats (Reinforced)
mods.effectExpr: Global.Buckets += Level; Global.RBuckets += Level; CFUsed += 8 * Level; LoadUsed += 250 * Level; Cost += 5 * Level

mods.name: Bucket Seats (Extra Big Reinforced)
mods.effectExpr: Global.Buckets += Level; Global.RBuckets += Level; CFUsed += 8 * Level; LoadUsed += 350 * Level; Cost += 5 * Level

mods.name: Floatation Packages (Aircraft)
mods.effectExpr: Economy += Engine.Economy * 0.2; Chassis.ChassisType & 64; Speed *= 0.9 ? 0.5; Cost += Chassis.Cost * 1.2

mods.name: Mechanical Arm #1
mods.effectExpr: Cost += Body * 250; CFUsed += 2; Level < 4; Cost += Level * 8000 ? 10000; Local.Strength = Body * Body + Level; LoadUsed += Local.Strength * 25

mods.name: Mechanical Arm #2
mods.effectExpr: Cost += Body * 250; CFUsed += 2; Level < 4; Cost += Level * 8000 ? 10000; Local.Strength = Body * Body + Level; LoadUsed += Local.Strength * 25

mods.name: Mechanical Arm #3
mods.effectExpr: Cost += Body * 250; CFUsed += 2; Level < 4; Cost += Level * 8000 ? 10000; Local.Strength = Body * Body + Level; LoadUsed += Local.Strength * 25

mods.name: Mechanical Arm #4
mods.effectExpr: Cost += Body * 250; CFUsed += 2; Level < 4; Cost += Level * 8000 ? 10000; Local.Strength = Body * Body + Level; LoadUsed += Local.Strength * 25

mods.name: Sidecar
mods.effectExpr: Global.SideCar = 2; Local.CF = Level : 4 8 12; CF += Local.CF; CFMax += Local.CF; Handling += Level : 1 1 2; Cost += Level : 10 20 35; Speed -= 15; Economy *= 0.9
